raw_output_payload.reasoning:
Need bash command: find . -type f -exec grep -l 'Hello' {} + | xargs -I{} dirname {} | sort -u

Simplify: find . -type f -exec grep -l 'Hello' {} + | xargs -n1 dirname | sort -u

Or use -printf "%h\n" with grep? Use find . -type f -exec grep -q 'Hello' {} \; -print0 | xargs -0 -n1 dirname | sort -u
